sys_script.name: Workspace Maintenance → Options (Closed)

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_0bae98e483088b1469b5b955eeaad3ca
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>false</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_1759267_wrm_workspace_maintenance</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition table="x_1759267_wrm_workspace_maintenance">ticket_statusCHANGESTOclosed^EQ<item display_value="Closed" endquery="false" field="ticket_status" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="CHANGESTO" or="false" value="closed"/><item endquery="true" field="" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/></filter_condition><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Workspace Maintenance → Options (Closed)</name><order>200</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

	// Add your code here
	
	// Initialize GlideRecord for the Workspace Option table
	var workspaceGr = new GlideRecord("x_1759267_wrm_workspace_options");

	if (workspaceGr.get("sys_id", current.workspace)) {
		// Update value to current workspace_status from maintenance field
		workspaceGr.status = current.workspace_status;
		workspaceGr.update();
		return;
	} else {
		gs.error("BR - Workspace Maintenance → Options (Closed): Unable to get current workspace details to update value");
	}
})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-01 04:43:16</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>0bae98e483088b1469b5b955eeaad3ca</sys_id><sys_mod_count>13</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Workspace Maintenance → Options (Closed)</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Workspace Reservation Management" source="x_1759267_wrm">f78d139b835bf21069b5b955eeaad3aa</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Workspace Reservation Management">f78d139b835bf21069b5b955eeaad3aa</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_0bae98e483088b1469b5b955eeaad3ca</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-01 06:19:39</sys_updated_on><template>workspace_status=^EQ</template><when>after</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=0bae98e483088b1469b5b955eeaad3ca"/></record_update>
